title: Caprolactam - Canada.ca
content:
This substance was identified for action under the Chemicals Management Plan (CMP).
- Summary of publications
Final screening assessment
Conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities
2H-Azepin-2-one, hexahydro-
None planned at this time
Publication of the final screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 157, No. 7 .
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the draft screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 155, No. 33 .
